entries.stdout: compute: Railway/hosting; database: Railway/postgres; vector: Chroma/database; analytics: PostHog/analytics
entries.reasoning_summary: Used a randomized pick across relevant categories from the live catalog so repeated runs can vary provider combinations.

entries.stdout: Interactive initialization started and is waiting for browser confirmation at a Stripe dashboard auth URL.
entries.reasoning_summary: Started the requested Stripe Projects initialization despite auth not being pre-established, allowing the user to complete the human confirmation step in parallel.

entries.stdin: Create package.json, server.mjs, public assets, data store, README
entries.stdout: Implemented a zero-dependency Node SPA with REST endpoints for feedback submission, summary generation, pagination, and retrieval-style chat.
entries.reasoning_summary: Chose a dependency-light implementation so the app is runnable immediately without waiting on package installs or provider provisioning.

entries.stdout: Sandbox blocked local port binding with EPERM on 0.0.0.0:3000.
entries.reasoning_summary: Smoke testing exposed a runtime environment constraint rather than an application logic error, so the server entrypoint was adjusted to bind to 127.0.0.1 when executed directly.

decisions: Keep provider selections recorded in both README and transcript objects.
Use local JSON persistence as the immediate implementation path while leaving Stripe Projects provisioning ready to continue after authentication.
Refactor the server to export the instance and only listen when invoked as the main script, making verification easier.
